tagged_types.name: Instance
tagged_types.code: type Instance is new OpenToken.Recognizer.Instance with private;

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code:
function Get (Exclude : Ada.Strings.Maps.Character_Set := Ada.Strings.Maps.Null_Set)
             return Instance

subprograms.name: Redefine
subprograms.code:
procedure Redefine (Inst    : in out Instance;
                    Exclude : in     Ada.Strings.Maps.Character_Set)
